content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt explicitly calls this a "public beta" and mentions "still testing", "expect rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt)
Pierre: Apple reviewers routinely reject builds whose release notes signal that the app is a beta or unfinished, since App Store releases must be production-ready. Here the release notes say "Welcome to the TaskTide public beta!" and "expect rough edges" — this may trigger review questions or rejection under 2.2. Rewrite the release notes to describe finished, user-facing changes without beta/testing language.
